mapper.sql: select d.demand_id, d.demand_no, d.title, d.demand_type, d.demand_source, d.project_id, d.variant_id, d.module_id, d.feature_id, d.business_background, d.expected_result, d.impact_page, d.impact_api, d.impact_data, d.impact_permission, d.impact_export_or_async, d.acceptance_text, d.attachments, d.status, d.creator_id, d.developer_user_id, developer.user_name as developer_user_name, developer.nick_name as developer_nick_name, d.create_by, d.create_time, d.update_by, d.update_time, d.remark from req_demand d left join sys_user developer on developer.user_id = d.developer_user_id
mapper.insert: insert into req_demand(demand_no, title, demand_type, demand_source, project_id, variant_id, module_id, feature_id, business_background, expected_result, impact_page, impact_api, impact_data, impact_permission, impact_export_or_async, acceptance_text, attachments, status, creator_id, developer_user_id, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{demandNo}, #{title}, #{demandType}, #{demandSource}, #{projectId}, #{variantId}, #{moduleId}, #{featureId}, #{businessBackground}, #{expectedResult}, #{impactPage}, #{impactApi}, #{impactData}, #{impactPermission}, #{impactExportOrAsync}, #{acceptanceText}, #{attachments}, #{status}, #{creatorId}, #{developerUserId}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update req_demand set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where demand_id = #{demandId}
mapper.delete:
delete from req_demand where demand_id in
#{demandId}
mapper.select: select count(distinct u.user_id) from sys_user u inner join sys_user_role ur on ur.user_id = u.user_id inner join sys_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id where u.del_flag = '0' and u.status = '0' and r.del_flag = '0' and r.status = '0' and r.role_key = #{roleKey} and u.user_id = #{userId}

select p.project_name as projectName, count(distinct d.demand_id) as demandCount, round(count(distinct case when req_pkg.package_id is not null then d.demand_id end) / greatest(count(distinct d.demand_id), 1) * 100, 2) as packageRate, round(count(distinct case when plan_pkg.package_id is not null then d.demand_id end) / greatest(count(distinct d.demand_id), 1) * 100, 2) as planRate, round(count(distinct case when exec_pkg.package_id is not null then d.demand_id end) / greatest(count(distinct d.demand_id), 1) * 100, 2) as executionReportRate, round(count(distinct case when review_pkg.package_id is not null then d.demand_id end) / greatest(count(distinct d.demand_id), 1) * 100, 2) as reviewReportRate, round(count(distinct case when r.harness_status = 'initialized' then r.repo_id end) / greatest(count(distinct r.repo_id), 1) * 100, 2) as harnessCoverageRate from req_project p left join req_demand d on d.project_id = p.project_id left join req_repository r on r.project_id = p.project_id left join req_package_version req_pkg on req_pkg.demand_id = d.demand_id and req_pkg.artifact_type = 'requirement' left join req_package_version plan_pkg on plan_pkg.demand_id = d.demand_id and plan_pkg.artifact_type = 'plan' left join req_package_version exec_pkg on exec_pkg.demand_id = d.demand_id and exec_pkg.artifact_type = 'execution_report' left join req_package_version review_pkg on review_pkg.demand_id = d.demand_id and review_pkg.artifact_type = 'review_report' group by p.project_id, p.project_name order by demandCount desc, p.project_id desc
